app.name: mDNS Browser
app.one_liner: A cross-platform GUI application for browsing mDNS services, built with Rust, Tauri, and Leptos.

screens.name: Service Browser
screens.purpose: Display discovered mDNS services in a searchable, filterable list with details like name, type, IP, and port.

rust_commands.name: set_log_level
rust_commands.purpose: Dynamically adjusts the application's logging verbosity based on user preference.

rust_commands.name: start_mdns_discovery
rust_commands.purpose: Initiates mDNS service discovery on the local network and streams results to the frontend.

mvp_plan: week 1: Implement basic mDNS discovery using existing Rust libraries
week 1: Render discovered services in a responsive table
week 1: Set up Tauri + Leptos project structure
acceptance_tests: Log level can be changed via command-line flag and affects file output.
On launch, the app begins discovering mDNS services without user input.
Services are displayed with name, type, IP, and port within 5 seconds of appearing on the network.
